projection.covered: complete request including unknown extension members unless explicitly excluded

rationale./authority: renewable authenticated authorization envelope, checked independently
rationale./operation/retry: attempt metadata that changes on an identical retry

projection.object_order: ascending lexicographic order of decoded UTF-8 key bytes
projection.number_semantics: finite IEEE-754 binary64 bits, network byte order; integer and exactly equivalent binary64 spellings are identical; negative zero is preserved, including lexical -0 and -0.0 as the same negative-zero value
projection.string_semantics: decoded valid Unicode encoded as UTF-8

encoding.stream: domain bytes followed by one encoded projected root object

verification.retry_invariant: same mutation with retry=true and/or a renewed valid authority lease has the same digest
verification.content_conflict: same operation key with any covered-content change is rejected
verification.authority_precondition: before cache lookup, bind the cryptographically authenticated caller to the supplied holder and require the supplied lease to equal the current unexpired AuthorityMachine lease
verification.cross_principal_rule: authenticated principal is part of the cache key; transfer never replays another principal's result and an unprovable retry returns outcome_unknown
verification.downgrade_rule: expired, stale, weaker, mismatched-holder, or non-current authority rejects before cache lookup
